title: THE TWIDDLERS Decorate Your Own Mug Set, Paint with Colour Pens - 4 Mugs Arts & Crafts Pottery Kit for Kids and Adults, Personalised Birthday Day Gift for All
features: 🎨Perfect Gift for All: Our personalised mugs for kids will ensure that special touch to your gift. Decorate them with the recipients names or initials with the ink pens provided, making for an ideal personal gesture.

🎨Unleash Your Inner Artist: Great for those rainy days, our design your own mugs will keep the kids happily entertained for hours. As well, they’ll be ideal at birthdays as arts & crafts gifts, as mothers day gifts from kids or fathers day gifts from kids, stocking fillers, small gifts & more.

🎨﻿Bake Them: To keep your desired artwork in place, leave to dry before baking for 4 hours, bake your DIY mugs in the oven for 40 minutes at degrees 220c, and leave to dry afterwards for another 4 hours.

🎨Premium Quality: Made from high quality new bone china, our childrens mug painting kit are durable & once painted & sealed, will last for many cups of tea & coffee. The box provided will complete your gifts presentation.
🎨Satisfaction Guaranteed: The Twiddlers offers 100% warranty on our paint your own sets for kids. Please contact us if you have any issues and we will reply within 24 hours.
description: Made of porcelain, our set of 4 white mugs is ideal to decorate and draw with the felt tip pens provided. They are perfect for an art project, rainy days, etc., to fill Christmas stockings or to give personalized gifts. Also ideal for birthdays, Christmas and Easter
